title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Saylor downplays Bitcoin slide as Strategy faces $11B paper loss
summary: Strategy’s Bitcoin paper loss tops $11 billion as Saylor pointed to ETF outflows and AI infrastructure spending as factors pressuring BTC.

title: Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin Machine Is Misfiring on Every Cylinder
summary: Michael Saylor built Strategy Inc. around a straightforward idea: raise money to buy Bitcoin, then never sell it. Over time, that simple bet has turned far more complicated.

title: Glazer Family Members Debate Man United Stake Sale
summary: Members of the billionaire Glazer family have been debating whether to sell their stake in Manchester United after decades of ownership often blighted by fan protests. Tiwa Adebayo explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michael Saylor Calls Bitcoin’s Drop a ‘Capital Rotation’ to AI as BTC Slides Below $62,000
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Michael Saylor Calls Bitcoin’s Drop a ‘Capital Rotation’ to AI as BTC Slides Below $62,000
Michael Saylor argued the bitcoin selloff reflects a broader capital rotation into AI infrastructure rather than weakening fundamentals for Bitcoin.

title: Bitcoin Buys a Home: Better and Coinbase Close First Fannie Mae-Backed BTC Mortgage
summary:

Bitcoin Buys a Home: Better and Coinbase Close First Fannie Mae-Backed BTC Mortgage
Better and Coinbase have funded the first Fannie Mae-backed mortgage that lets homebuyers use Bitcoin as collateral for their down payment loan

title: DOJ Task Force Freezes $3.8M in Illicit Crypto—With Help From Coinbase, SpaceX and Meta
summary: Some of America's biggest companies helped squash crypto fraud stemming from organized crime in Southeast Asia.

title: Fannie Mae-Backed Bitcoin Home Mortgages Are Finally Here, Coinbase Says
summary: Coinbase said a Michigan couple closed on the first-ever conventional, Fannie Mae-backed home mortgage by pledging Bitcoin as collateral.

title: JPMorgan says crypto bill may have only a narrow window for passage this year
summary: JPMorgan analysts said the crypto market structure bill, or Clarity Act, may have only a narrow window for passage this year.

title: Senate Republicans urged financial regulators to rework bank capital rules for digital assets
summary: A group of Senate Republicans is pressing key financial regulatory agencies to clarify capital standards for digital assets.

title: Goldman Sachs expects SpaceX’s AI revenue to surge 100 times by 2030
summary: Projections by Wall Street bank underpin the $1.78tn valuation group is pitching in IPO

title: SpaceX IPO shows Musk’s genius is in mythmaking
summary: How exactly the company plans to support its gargantuan valuation is not obvious
